prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `414297c0`.
codex_response:
Implemented `414297c0` as an ARC2 task package. The rule is: find the large solid rectangle, crop to it, keep its internal colored cells, then copy each matching external red-mask motif onto the same-colored cell inside the crop. The Opus summary hint was used because it matched the official examples; no `notes.md` or new primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: `arc2.shared.verify` passed `4/4` official examples, the shared builder produced `1000` examples plus all required artifacts, and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 414297c0` passed `1000/1000` generated examples. No terminal image viewer was installed, so I sanity-checked the rendered preview outputs programmatically and sampled generated grids directly; the distribution stays on-family with one dominant rectangle, sparse external 3x3 motif blocks, and copied red masks of the right scale.
